mapper.sql: id, user_id, balance, total_recharge, total_consumption, version, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_fund_account WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_fund_account (user_id, balance, total_recharge, total_consumption, version, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{balance}, #{totalRecharge}, #{totalConsumption}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_fund_account SET balance = balance + #{amount}, total_recharge = total_recharge + #{amount}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE edu_fund_account SET balance = balance - #{amount}, total_consumption = total_consumption + #{amount}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted = 0 AND balance >= #{amount}
